Fields.Name: Weather SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxId for weather -1: No weather Sfx Set for indoor and outdoor use. Items that can be erased with Above Shadow, such as raindrops of interactive particles, are OK here.

Fields.Name: Wind SFX ID
Fields.Description: Wind SfxId -1: No wind Sfx Created only outdoors

Fields.Name: Ground Hit SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxId for ground hit effect -1: None for ground hit effect

Fields.Name: Wet Time
Fields.Description: Time to get completely wet (time until the weight of m00_00_0000_WeatherBase reaches 1.0) -1: No wetness (m00_00_0000_WeatherBase remains 0.0)

Fields.Name: GPARAM ID
Fields.Description: Specify the XXX part of Gparam (m00_00_? XXX_WeatherOutdoor.gparamxml) for outdoor weather. Gparam to be used can be shared between weather.

Fields.Name: Next Weather Lot - Min Duration
Fields.Description: Specify the minimum time to the next weather lottery in in-game seconds. When transitioning to this weather, the time to the next weather will be a random time between the minimum and maximum.

Fields.Name: Next Weather Lot - Max Duration
Fields.Description: Specify the maximum time until the next weather lottery in in-game seconds. When transitioning to this weather, the time to the next weather will be a random time between the minimum and maximum.

Fields.Name: Wet SpEffect [0]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID on the character (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Wet SpEffect [1]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID on the character (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Wet SpEffect [2]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID on the character (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Wet SpEffect [3]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID on the character (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Wet SpEffect [4]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID on the character (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Weather SFX - Indoors Only - SFX ID
Fields.Description: Weather SfxId -1: No weather Sfx indoors only

Fields.Name: Weather SFX - Outdoors Only - SFX ID
Fields.Description: Weather SfxId -1: No weather Sfx, outdoor only

Fields.Name: Overwrite Weight Valuue in Distant View Camera
Fields.Description: Overwrite weight value in distant view camera (SEQ16724)
